mnemonics: CLEAR Future Clouds: Carbon-neutral, Low-energy, Efficient, AI-optimized, Renewable-powered
keyPoints: Hyperscale data centers will increasingly use AI for dynamic power and cooling management
The industry is moving towards 100% renewable energy sourcing for operations
Circular economy principles will be applied to hardware lifecycle management
commonMistakes: Assuming cloud computing is inherently green without considering energy source
Overlooking the embodied carbon in hardware manufacturing and disposal
Focusing only on operational efficiency while ignoring supply chain sustainability
